attempted_route: matminer.StrToComposition + ElementProperty.from_preset('magpie') with ep.set_n_jobs(1) but stc left at default n_jobs; sklearn.RandomForestRegressor(n_estimators=500, n_jobs=-1) via Pipeline
observation: TIMEOUT exit_code=-9 after 180s; multiprocessing fork in StrToComposition.featurize_dataframe re-imported candidate.py as __mp_main__, recursively re-spawning Pool workers
rationale: StrToComposition.featurize_dataframe spawns a multiprocessing Pool (default n_jobs) whose fork start method re-imports the top-level script, hitting featurize_dataframe again and recursing. Setting n_jobs=1 only on ElementProperty left StrToComposition unconstrained.
recommended_alternative: Call stc.set_n_jobs(1) before stc.featurize_dataframe AND ep.set_n_jobs(1) before ep.featurize_dataframe, or guard with 'if __name__ == __main__'. Keep all other parameters (magpie preset, RF n_estimators=500) unchanged.
